LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT DARYL FONG'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NO LONGER AN ACTIVE COMPLAINT IN LIGHT OF THIS COURT'S RULING ON DEFENDANT CCSF'S DEMURRER ON OCTOBER 27, 2009. MR. WHITE MAY RESTORE THIS DEMURRER BACK INTO THE CALENDAR BY FILING A MOTION WITH A BRIEF STATING THE FACTS WHY IT NEEDS TO BE RESTORED. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PLAINTIFF TERRY MORGAN'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL IS DENIED FOR THREE INDEPENDENT REASONS. THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE BEFORE THE COURT; THE DISMISSAL IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AND THE PLAINTIFF WAS ABLE TO HANDLE MATTERS IN COURT DURING THE PERIOD THAT PLAINTIFF CLAIMS HE IS INCAPACITATED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL

calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Terry Morgan'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Feb-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- TERRY G. MORGAN, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. JOSHUA S. WHITE, TEL. NO. 554-4259 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. Plaintiff Terry Morgan'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal IS DENIED FOR THREE INDEPENDENT REASONS. THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE BEFORE THE COURT; THE DISMISSAL IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AND THE PLAINTIFF WAS ABLE TO HANDLE MATTERS IN COURT DURING THE PERIOD THAT PLAINTIFF CLAIMS HE IS INCAPACITATED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
